title: Anti Diagonals
hints: Anti-diagonals are diagonals that go from top-right to bottom-left.
For each anti-diagonal, start from the top row and move down-right, or start from the rightmost column and move down-left.
The number of anti-diagonals is 2*N-1 for an N*N matrix.
Fill vacant spaces with 0 to make each row of length N.
